title: lolium × festucaceum
intro: Lolium × festucaceum, also known as ryegrass, is a hybrid species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, headaches, and respiratory problems. Lolium × festucaceum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
